PASTOR WALE OLADIMEJI (SeesofGrace)

Pastor Wale Oladimeji, popularly known as SeesofGrace, is a passionate minister of the gospel, music director, and visionary leader committed to advancing GodŌĆÖs kingdom through worship and spiritual excellence. An indigene of Ilorin South in Kwara State, his life reflects a profound dedication to God and an unwavering passion for ministry.

In 2017, Pastor Wale received a divine call into the music ministry, a mandate that marked the beginning of a remarkable journey of grace, growth, and impact. Since responding to this call, he has emerged as a respected voice in gospel music and ministry leadership, known for his anointed worship expression and his commitment to raising true worshippers.

He currently serves as the Music Director of SeedofGrace Music, where he provides spiritual and musical oversight, mentors upcoming ministers, and leads worship experiences that draw people into deeper intimacy with God. His leadership experience extends beyond his ministry base, having served as the Music Director of GOMAN and as the Chairman of the Gospel Music Association of Nigeria (GOMAN), Alimosho Chapter, where he contributed significantly to the growth, structure, and unity of gospel music practitioners in the region.

Academically, Pastor Wale is well established in both technology and theology. He holds a Bachelor of Science degree in Communication Technology, along with five professional certifications in Information Technology, demonstrating excellence and versatility across digital and technical fields. His theological grounding includes a Higher Diploma in Pastoral Theology from the Redeemed Christian Church of God Bible College (RCCG, 2019) and a Bachelor of Arts in Ministry and Theology from School of Urban Missions, University of America (SUM Bible College). These qualifications enrich his pastoral depth, doctrinal understanding, and leadership competence.

Pastor Wale is a dedicated husband and father, blessed with a beautiful family who support and share in his ministry call. His life testimony continues to inspire many, reflecting humility, purpose, and the transformative power of God's grace.

Through worship, teaching, mentorship, and leadership, he remains committed to raising a generation of worshippers, empowering young ministers, and expanding the influence of GodŌĆÖs kingdom. All glory to the Almighty God for his continual faithfulness in Pastor WaleŌĆÖs life and ministry.
